note: Overworld party sprites — painterly game sprites on solid black bg, supersampled 128x128 then drawn at TILE in-game. Short punchy prompts; flux does better with less.

sprites.name: kaida_overworld
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of Kaida, young warrior, short swept magenta hair, cyan jacket, dark leggings, glowing magenta pulse-blade held low ready, mid-stride battle stance, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: vex_overworld
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of Vex, tall hooded mystic in a dark cloak, cyan chrono-glyphs glowing on the hem, raising a chrono-staff crowned with a cyan orb, arcane casting stance, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, deep purples and cyan glow, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: rune_overworld
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of Rune, stocky engineer with yellow-lensed goggles and a small antenna, mustard-yellow work rig with straps, swinging a forge-hammer, small hover-drone floating at the shoulder, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, mustard rust and cyan palette, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette
